title: Document STORAGE_DRIVER and STORAGE_OPTS environment variable
body:
Default settings for storage can be overriden by setting these environment
variables.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: could it be `STORAGE_DRIVER` so that it can also be used by other tools?

That's why I wondered if it would be a global for containers/storage

On Thu, Aug 16, 2018, 05:04 Giuseppe Scrivano <notifications@github.com>
wrote:

> could it be STORAGE_DRIVER so that it can also be used by other tools?
>
> —

Oh man. By happenstance I was passing that to my build.sh to set the value
in a flag to buildah, but didn't check whether it trickled down the stack!
